---
title: "Setup Guide"
subtitle: "Get Your Quest Environment Ready"
---

# ⚙️ Setup Guide

Welcome, Code Warrior! This guide will help you set up your local development environment for all three quest tracks.

---

## 🐍 Python Track Setup

### Option 1: No Installation (Recommended for Beginners)
Use the in-browser execution — **no setup required**!

- Code cells execute directly on quest pages
- [JupyterLite](jupyterlite.qmd) provides full Jupyter environment
- Perfect for learning and experimentation

### Option 2: Local Python Installation

#### Install Python
1. Download Python from [python.org](https://www.python.org/downloads/)
2. Version 3.9 or higher recommended
3. Check installation:
   ```bash
   python --version
   ```

#### Install UV (Modern Package Manager)
```bash
# macOS/Linux
curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh

# Windows
powershell -c "irm https://astral.sh/uv/install.ps1 | iex"
```

#### Install Jupyter
```bash
# Using pip
pip install jupyter

# Using uv
uv pip install jupyter
```

#### Clone & Run Notebooks
```bash
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/CS_Quest_Adventures
cd CS_Quest_Adventures
jupyter lab
```

---

## 🦀 Rust Track Setup

### Install Rust
```bash
# Download and install rustup
curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh

# Verify installation
rustc --version
cargo --version
```

### Configure Editor (Optional but Recommended)
**VS Code:**
```bash
# Install rust-analyzer extension
code --install-extension rust-lang.rust-analyzer
```

### Try a Quick Program
```bash
# Create new project
cargo new hello_quest
cd hello_quest

# Run it
cargo run
```

### Online Alternative
Use [Rust Playground](https://play.rust-lang.org/) — no installation needed!

---

## 🎮 Pygame Track Setup

### Install Python (if not already)
See [Python Track Setup](#option-2-local-python-installation) above.

### Install Pygame
```bash
# Using pip
pip install pygame

# Using uv
uv pip install pygame
```

### Test Installation
```python
import pygame
print(pygame.version.ver)
```

### Download Quest Projects
```bash
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/CS_Quest_Adventures
cd CS_Quest_Adventures/tracks/pygame/projects

# Run a quest
cd Day_01
python main.py
```

### System Requirements
- Python 3.7+
- 50MB disk space
- Graphics support (OpenGL for some effects)

---

## 🔧 Recommended Tools

### Code Editors

**Visual Studio Code** (All Tracks)
- Download: [code.visualstudio.com](https://code.visualstudio.com/)
- Extensions:
  - Python (by Microsoft)
  - Rust Analyzer
  - Jupyter

**PyCharm** (Python/Pygame)
- Download: [jetbrains.com/pycharm](https://www.jetbrains.com/pycharm/)
- Community Edition is free

**IntelliJ IDEA** (Rust)
- Download: [jetbrains.com/idea](https://www.jetbrains.com/idea/)
- Install Rust plugin

### Terminal/Shell

**macOS/Linux:**
- Built-in terminal works great
- Consider [iTerm2](https://iterm2.com/) (macOS)

**Windows:**
- Windows Terminal (recommended)
- PowerShell
- Git Bash

---

## 📦 Complete Environment Setup

For all three tracks simultaneously:

```bash
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/CS_Quest_Adventures
cd CS_Quest_Adventures

# Install Python dependencies
pip install -r requirements.txt

# Install Rust
curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh

# Install Pygame
pip install pygame

# Verify everything
python --version
rustc --version
pip list | grep pygame
```

---

## 🆘 Troubleshooting

### Python Issues

**"python not found"**
```bash
# Try python3 instead
python3 --version

# Or add Python to PATH
```

**Package installation fails**
```bash
# Upgrade pip
pip install --upgrade pip

# Use --user flag
pip install --user jupyter
```

### Rust Issues

**"cargo not found"**
```bash
# Source the cargo environment
source $HOME/.cargo/env

# Or restart terminal
```

**Compilation errors**
```bash
# Update Rust
rustup update

# Clean build
cargo clean
cargo build
```

### Pygame Issues

**No sound on Linux**
```bash
# Install dependencies
sudo apt-get install python3-pygame
```

**Import error**
```bash
# Reinstall pygame
pip uninstall pygame
pip install pygame --upgrade
```

---

## 🌐 Cloud Development Options

### GitHub Codespaces
- Full VS Code in browser
- Pre-configured environments
- Free tier available

### GitPod
- Similar to Codespaces
- Works with any Git repository

### Google Colab (Python only)
- Free Jupyter notebooks
- GPU support
- Great for data analysis

---

## 📚 Additional Resources

### Python
- [Python Official Tutorial](https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/)
- [Real Python](https://realpython.com/)
- [Python Documentation](https://docs.python.org/)

### Rust
- [The Rust Book](https://doc.rust-lang.org/book/)
- [Rust by Example](https://doc.rust-lang.org/rust-by-example/)
- [Rustlings Exercises](https://github.com/rust-lang/rustlings)

### Pygame
- [Pygame Documentation](https://www.pygame.org/docs/)
- [Pygame Tutorials](https://www.pygame.org/wiki/tutorials)
- [Real Python Pygame Guide](https://realpython.com/pygame-a-primer/)

---

## ✅ Ready to Quest!

Once setup is complete:

- [Start Python Quests →](tracks/python/index.qmd)
- [Start Rust Quests →](tracks/rust/index.qmd)
- [Start Pygame Quests →](tracks/pygame/index.qmd)

---

## 💬 Need Help?

- Check our [FAQ](sitedocs/faq.md)
- Open an issue on GitHub
- Contact: obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu

[← Back to Home](index.qmd)
